_note: Synthetic NVD-shaped payload. Real NVD API: https://services.nvd.nist.gov/rest/json/cves/2.0

vulnerabilities.description: Heap buffer overflow in radar data processing component permits remote code execution by an attacker on the management VLAN.
Improper privilege management allows a local operator to escalate to system privileges on the GCS host.
Hardcoded maintenance credentials present in firmware permit unauthorized configuration changes.
Insufficient verification of IRS calibration messages may allow injection of crafted attitude data on the maintenance bus.
